signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin surged 2.2% to $77,541 and Ethereum added 0.7% to $2,390 on April 22, 2026, driven by the ceasefire extension removing geopolitical risk premiums and Strategy's $2.54B BTC purchase.[2]  
This real-time bullish catalyst has boosted risk-on sentiment, aligning with Ethereum's upward momentum above key supports like $2,030
